title: Friday Sermon 9 August 2002
description:
The Earth will shine with the light of her Lord and the Record will be presented, be laid and the Prophets and the witnesses will be brought and judgement will be given between them with justice and they will not be wronged.

('The Holy Quran'.  Al Zumar: 70).

Verse 70 of Surah al-Zumar cites the advent of the Holy Prophet (peace and blessings of Allah be on him) as the ‘earth shining with the light of her Lord’.  The Holy Prophet (peace and blessings be on him) would pray and supplicate to Allah the Exalted addressing Him as the Light of all creation.*

He had said that he as a servant of Allah had been the Seal of all Prophets from the time before the creation of Adam (on whom be peace) and that his advent was a result of the prayer of Abraham (on whom be peace) and that his blessed mother had seen a light when she gave birth to him.**

The Promised Messiah (on whom be peace) wrote that the world was indeed steeped in darkness (of brutality and ignorance) that was utterly transformed by the light of the Holy Prophet (peace and blessings be on him) whose claim and indeed a manifestation of the claim was that he was sent to dispel the darkness of the idea of idolatry. 

That when a person believes in the Holy Prophet (peace and blessings be on him) with absolute sincerity, acknowledges his greatness and follows him with obedience, negating one’s own self completely then one ultimately derives a part of the Divine Light that in turn dispels all the inherent negativity of that person, it is at this point that this Noor or light is infused in and eventually manifested through that person's knowledge and their actions.

The Promised Messiah (on whom be peace) wrote that it was not possible to express a befitting sense of gratitude for the blessing of being counted among the followers of a Prophet of God who was pure light and whose light is for all time and all eras.

* Muhammad ibn Ismail al-Bukhari.  'Sahih Bukhari'.  
** Ahmad ibn Hanbal.  'Musnad Ahmad ibn Hanbal'.

The text https://www.alislam.org/urdu/sermon/FST20020809-UR.pdf
